description_long: This is a stylized biplane with two stacked wings, painted predominantly blue with yellow and orange accents, and featuring cartoonish hand motifs on the wings. The fuselage is streamlined and decorated with the word 'SONIC' on the side, and the nose is pointed with a yellow propeller at the front. The cockpit is open and contains two animated characters, one piloting and one as a passenger, both with exaggerated, colorful features. The tail section is elongated and includes a horizontal stabilizer with a circular attachment at the end. The landing gear is not clearly visible, suggesting it may be retracted or stylized away. The overall design is playful and vibrant, with a strong emphasis on character and branding.
description: A vibrant, cartoonish blue biplane with yellow and orange accents, open cockpit, and animated characters seated inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double wings, yellow propeller, and both characters seated in the open cockpit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the 'SONIC' branding, character profiles, and the length of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail structure, horizontal stabilizer, and the back of the cockpit and characters.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the wing structure, tail attachment, and cockpit arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visibly depicted; likely stylized or omitted.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, mid-fuselage cockpit with tandem seating for two characters.
